goal: 实现 Claude Code private adapter I1

summary.title: Implement private Claude Code source adapter
summary.what: Added a private non-public Claude Code source adapter with raw JSONL inventory and parser support, registered it for programmatic source lookup, and covered synthetic sync/read behavior without exposing the source through the public CLI allowlist.
summary.why: The C4 experimental slice needed a private adapter path that can exercise source-aware indexing for Claude Code transcripts while preserving the current public cxs command surface as Codex-only.
summary.user_goal: 实现 Claude Code private adapter I1

decisions.chose: Registered claude-code as a SessionSourceAdapter with public=false while keeping public CLI source validation restricted to codex.
decisions.rationale: This preserves the experimental/private boundary and prevents accidental release of a new user-facing source option.
rejected: Expose --source claude-code in CLI commands during I1

decisions.chose: Indexed only top-level non-meta, non-sidechain user and assistant text content from string or text-block message content.
decisions.rationale: The private slice should avoid leaking tool output, thinking blocks, attachments, sidechain records, or structural parent identifiers into searchable projections.
rejected: Index arbitrary Claude Code content blocks
Include tool_result, thinking, attachment, or unknown blocks

decisions.chose: Used raw-file-backed synthetic fixtures and adapter-local inventory/parser modules, with lazy parser/inventory loading from the adapter.
decisions.rationale: Synthetic fixtures prove the behavior without depending on private real transcripts, and lazy loading keeps public CLI cold-start tests stable.
rejected: Broaden shared schema or public CLI contracts for this slice

decisions.chose: Raised timeout only for existing child-process and SQLite-lock integration test files.
decisions.rationale: Those tests legitimately spawn multiple tsx CLI children or wait through transient SQLite locks and exceeded Vitest's default 5s threshold under normal verification load.

rejected.alternative: Publish Claude Code as a public source now
rejected.reason: The accepted C4 scope was private-only and the public CLI still needs explicit product/release work before exposure.

rejected.alternative: Modify shared query or storage behavior for Claude Code
rejected.reason: The existing source-aware indexing path already supports programmatic private adapter usage for this slice.

review_notes: Validation: red test initially failed with unsupported source; green implementation passed focused source, CLI, and concurrency tests.
Validation: npm run check passed with 28 files and 176 tests.
Validation: npm run cxs -- status --source claude-code --json still returns unsupported_source, confirming public CLI remains closed.
No push, PR, npm release, global cxs install, or global skill update was performed.

architectural_claims: Session sources can include private adapters that are available to internal programmatic sync/read paths without being public CLI sources.
Claude Code raw JSONL support in this slice is adapter-local and does not require shared storage schema changes.
behavioral_changes: getSessionSourceAdapter("claude-code") returns a private Claude Code adapter.
Programmatic syncSessions with sourceId claude-code can index synthetic Claude Code JSONL files.
Claude Code parser skips meta, sidechain, tool, thinking, attachment, unknown, malformed, and empty records.
Public CLI commands still reject --source claude-code with unsupported_source.
security_implications: Parser intentionally allowlists user/assistant text and omits Claude Code tool outputs, thinking blocks, attachments, sidechain records, and parentUuid values from indexed projections.
No real user transcript fixtures were added.
migration_notes: No database migration or index version change is required for this private adapter slice.
Existing public cxs CLI behavior remains Codex-only until a future explicit release changes the allowlist.
